xanesnet.batchprocessors package¶

Public API for all XANESNET batch processors.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.BatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract base class for batch processors.

Converts a dataset batch into the correct model inputs and targets for a specific model architecture. Subclasses must implement input_preparation, target_preparation, and file_name_extraction.

abstractmethod input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare model input tensors from a batch.

Parameters:

batch (Any) – A collated batch produced by the dataset’s collate_fn.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Returns:

Dict mapping argument names to tensors (or related objects) expected by the model’s forward method.

input_preparation_single(dataset, index)[source]¶

Prepare model inputs from a single dataset sample.

Collates the sample at index into a batch of size 1 and delegates to input_preparation().

Parameters:

  • dataset (Dataset) – The dataset to draw the sample from.

  • index (int) – Index of the sample within the dataset.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Returns:

Dict mapping argument names to tensors expected by the model.

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Post-process raw model predictions before loss computation.

The default implementation returns predictions unchanged. Override in subclasses to apply masking or other per-batch transformations (e.g. selecting absorber atoms from a per-atom output tensor).

Parameters:

  • batch (Any) – The collated batch (may carry masks or indices needed for post-processing).

  • predictions (Tensor) – Raw model output tensor.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Post-processed predictions tensor.

abstractmethod target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare the target tensor from a batch.

Parameters:

batch (Any) – A collated batch produced by the dataset’s collate_fn.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target tensor for loss computation.

target_preparation_single(dataset, index)[source]¶

Prepare the target tensor from a single dataset sample.

Collates the sample at index into a batch of size 1 and delegates to target_preparation().

Parameters:

  • dataset (Dataset) – The dataset to draw the sample from.

  • index (int) – Index of the sample within the dataset.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target tensor for loss computation.

abstractmethod file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file name identifiers from a batch.

Parameters:

batch (Any) – A collated batch produced by the dataset’s collate_fn.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.BatchProcessorRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Registry for batch processor classes keyed by dataset and model type.

classmethod register(dataset_type, model_type)[source]¶

Register a batch processor class for a dataset/model pair.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Dataset registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

  • model_type (str) – Model registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[BatchProcessor]], type[BatchProcessor]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If the dataset/model pair is already registered.

classmethod get(dataset_type, model_type)[source]¶

Return the batch processor class registered for a dataset/model pair.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Dataset registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

  • model_type (str) – Model registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[BatchProcessor]

Returns:

Registered batch processor class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no processor is registered for the pair.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered dataset/model key pairs.

Return type:

list[tuple[str, str]]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.DescriptorLSTMBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for DescriptorData feeding the LSTM model.

Converts each descriptor vector into a one-step batch-first sequence, while keeping the target spectrum as one output vector per sample.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare LSTM inputs from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict with "x" containing descriptor sequences. (batch_size, sequence_length, n_features)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.x is None or has an unsupported shape.

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare targets from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Spectral intensity tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.DescriptorMLPBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for DescriptorData feeding the MLP model.

Extracts the precomputed descriptor vector x as model input and the spectral intensity array y as the target.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare MLP inputs from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict with "x" containing the descriptor tensor. (batch_size, n_features)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.x is None.

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare targets from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Spectral intensity tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.y is None.

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.GemNetBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the PyG-based GemNetDataset feeding the GemNet model.

All graph indices are precomputed in the dataset; this processor just forwards them and applies absorber_mask on the model’s per-atom predictions.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare GemNet model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor | None]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.gemnet.gemnet.GemNet.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, num_targets)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.GemNetOCBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the PyG-based GemNetDataset feeding GemNet-OC.

GemNet-OC reads a large set of precomputed tensors (main/qint/a2ee2a/a2a graphs plus triplet, mixed-triplet and quadruplet indices). All are produced offline by GemNetDataset.prepare() and forwarded here as individual torch.Tensor kwargs (consistent with the GemNet processor). Optional fields are looked up with getattr(batch, name, None) so that downstream toggles on the model side can gate their use.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare GemNet-OC model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet-OC batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor | None]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.gemnet_oc.GemNetOC.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, num_targets)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet-OC batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet-OC batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.E3EEBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the E3EE dataset + E3EE model combination.

Node features are padded to (B, N_max, ...); edge and absorber-path tensors are flat and carry indices into the padded B * N_max layout (already offset by the dataset collate_fn).

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare E3EE model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEBatch) – Collated E3EE batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.e3ee.e3ee.E3EE.forward().

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEBatch) – Collated E3EE batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEBatch) – Collated E3EE batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.E3EEFullBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the E3EEFull dataset + E3EEFull model combination.

The model emits spectra for every atom in the padded layout ((B, N_max, nE)); this processor selects only the rows flagged by absorber_mask for loss computation (identical pattern to SchNet / DimeNet).

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare E3EEFull model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.e3ee_full.e3ee_full.E3EEFull.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site spectra from the padded per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch carrying absorber_mask. (B, N_max)

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (B, N_max, nE)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, nE)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.EnvEmbedBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the EnvEmbed dataset + EnvEmbed model combination.

The EnvEmbed dataset collate_fn produces an EnvEmbedData batch with:

  • descriptor_features: (B, N, H) padded descriptor features

  • distance_features: (B, N) distances from absorber

  • lengths: (B,) number of real atoms per sample

  • file_name: list[str] sample identifiers

  • basis: SpectralBasis spectral basis object (not a tensor, not collated)

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare EnvEmbed model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (EnvEmbedData) – Collated EnvEmbed batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor | SpectralBasis]

Returns:

Dict matching xanesnet.models.envembed.envembed.EnvEmbed.forward().

Raises:

ValueError – If any required model input is missing from the batch.

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (EnvEmbedData) – Collated EnvEmbed batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.intensities is None.

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (EnvEmbedData) – Collated EnvEmbed batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.file_name is None.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.GeometryGraphDimeNetBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the GeometryGraphDataset feeding DimeNet/DimeNet++.

Forwards precomputed triplet-interaction indices (idx_kj, idx_ji) alongside the standard geometry graph tensors.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare DimeNet model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.dimenet.dimenet.DimeNet.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry graph batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, out_channels)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.GeometryGraphSchNetBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the GeometryGraphDataset feeding SchNet.

Forwards the minimal set of graph tensors required by SchNet (no triplet indices needed).

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare SchNet model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.schnet.schnet.SchNet.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry graph batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, reduce_channels_2)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

Submodules¶

xanesnet.batchprocessors.base module¶

Abstract base class for all XANESNET batch processors.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.base.BatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract base class for batch processors.

Converts a dataset batch into the correct model inputs and targets for a specific model architecture. Subclasses must implement input_preparation, target_preparation, and file_name_extraction.

abstractmethod input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare model input tensors from a batch.

Parameters:

batch (Any) – A collated batch produced by the dataset’s collate_fn.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Returns:

Dict mapping argument names to tensors (or related objects) expected by the model’s forward method.

input_preparation_single(dataset, index)[source]¶

Prepare model inputs from a single dataset sample.

Collates the sample at index into a batch of size 1 and delegates to input_preparation().

Parameters:

  • dataset (Dataset) – The dataset to draw the sample from.

  • index (int) – Index of the sample within the dataset.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Returns:

Dict mapping argument names to tensors expected by the model.

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Post-process raw model predictions before loss computation.

The default implementation returns predictions unchanged. Override in subclasses to apply masking or other per-batch transformations (e.g. selecting absorber atoms from a per-atom output tensor).

Parameters:

  • batch (Any) – The collated batch (may carry masks or indices needed for post-processing).

  • predictions (Tensor) – Raw model output tensor.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Post-processed predictions tensor.

abstractmethod target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare the target tensor from a batch.

Parameters:

batch (Any) – A collated batch produced by the dataset’s collate_fn.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target tensor for loss computation.

target_preparation_single(dataset, index)[source]¶

Prepare the target tensor from a single dataset sample.

Collates the sample at index into a batch of size 1 and delegates to target_preparation().

Parameters:

  • dataset (Dataset) – The dataset to draw the sample from.

  • index (int) – Index of the sample within the dataset.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target tensor for loss computation.

abstractmethod file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file name identifiers from a batch.

Parameters:

batch (Any) – A collated batch produced by the dataset’s collate_fn.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.descriptor_lstm module¶

Batch processor for the descriptor + LSTM model combination.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.descriptor_lstm.DescriptorLSTMBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for DescriptorData feeding the LSTM model.

Converts each descriptor vector into a one-step batch-first sequence, while keeping the target spectrum as one output vector per sample.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare LSTM inputs from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict with "x" containing descriptor sequences. (batch_size, sequence_length, n_features)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.x is None or has an unsupported shape.

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare targets from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Spectral intensity tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.descriptor_mlp module¶

Batch processor for the descriptor + MLP model combination.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.descriptor_mlp.DescriptorMLPBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for DescriptorData feeding the MLP model.

Extracts the precomputed descriptor vector x as model input and the spectral intensity array y as the target.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare MLP inputs from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict with "x" containing the descriptor tensor. (batch_size, n_features)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.x is None.

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare targets from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Spectral intensity tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.y is None.

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from a descriptor batch.

Parameters:

batch (DescriptorData) – Collated descriptor batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.e3ee module¶

Batch processor for the E3EE dataset and model combination.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.e3ee.E3EEBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the E3EE dataset + E3EE model combination.

Node features are padded to (B, N_max, ...); edge and absorber-path tensors are flat and carry indices into the padded B * N_max layout (already offset by the dataset collate_fn).

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare E3EE model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEBatch) – Collated E3EE batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.e3ee.e3ee.E3EE.forward().

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEBatch) – Collated E3EE batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEBatch) – Collated E3EE batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.e3ee_full module¶

Batch processor for the E3EEFull dataset and model combination.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.e3ee_full.E3EEFullBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the E3EEFull dataset + E3EEFull model combination.

The model emits spectra for every atom in the padded layout ((B, N_max, nE)); this processor selects only the rows flagged by absorber_mask for loss computation (identical pattern to SchNet / DimeNet).

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare E3EEFull model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.e3ee_full.e3ee_full.E3EEFull.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site spectra from the padded per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch carrying absorber_mask. (B, N_max)

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (B, N_max, nE)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, nE)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (E3EEFullBatch) – Collated E3EEFull batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.envembed module¶

Batch processor for the EnvEmbed dataset and model combination.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.envembed.EnvEmbedBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the EnvEmbed dataset + EnvEmbed model combination.

The EnvEmbed dataset collate_fn produces an EnvEmbedData batch with:

  • descriptor_features: (B, N, H) padded descriptor features

  • distance_features: (B, N) distances from absorber

  • lengths: (B,) number of real atoms per sample

  • file_name: list[str] sample identifiers

  • basis: SpectralBasis spectral basis object (not a tensor, not collated)

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare EnvEmbed model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (EnvEmbedData) – Collated EnvEmbed batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor | SpectralBasis]

Returns:

Dict matching xanesnet.models.envembed.envembed.EnvEmbed.forward().

Raises:

ValueError – If any required model input is missing from the batch.

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (EnvEmbedData) – Collated EnvEmbed batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra tensor. (batch_size, n_energies)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.intensities is None.

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (EnvEmbedData) – Collated EnvEmbed batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings. (batch_size,)

Raises:

ValueError – If batch.file_name is None.

xanesnet.batchprocessors.gemnet module¶

Batch processor for the GemNet model.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.gemnet.GemNetBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the PyG-based GemNetDataset feeding the GemNet model.

All graph indices are precomputed in the dataset; this processor just forwards them and applies absorber_mask on the model’s per-atom predictions.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare GemNet model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor | None]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.gemnet.gemnet.GemNet.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, num_targets)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.gemnet_oc module¶

Batch processor for the GemNet-OC model.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.gemnet_oc.GemNetOCBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the PyG-based GemNetDataset feeding GemNet-OC.

GemNet-OC reads a large set of precomputed tensors (main/qint/a2ee2a/a2a graphs plus triplet, mixed-triplet and quadruplet indices). All are produced offline by GemNetDataset.prepare() and forwarded here as individual torch.Tensor kwargs (consistent with the GemNet processor). Optional fields are looked up with getattr(batch, name, None) so that downstream toggles on the model side can gate their use.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare GemNet-OC model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet-OC batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor | None]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.gemnet_oc.GemNetOC.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, num_targets)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet-OC batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GemNetBatch) – Collated GemNet-OC batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.geometrygraph_dimenet module¶

Batch processor for DimeNet/DimeNet++ with geometry graphs.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.geometrygraph_dimenet.GeometryGraphDimeNetBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the GeometryGraphDataset feeding DimeNet/DimeNet++.

Forwards precomputed triplet-interaction indices (idx_kj, idx_ji) alongside the standard geometry graph tensors.

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare DimeNet model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.dimenet.dimenet.DimeNet.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry graph batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, out_channels)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.geometrygraph_schnet module¶

Batch processor for SchNet with geometry graphs.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.geometrygraph_schnet.GeometryGraphSchNetBatchProcessor[source]¶

Bases: BatchProcessor

Batch processor for the GeometryGraphDataset feeding SchNet.

Forwards the minimal set of graph tensors required by SchNet (no triplet indices needed).

input_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare SchNet model inputs from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

dict[str, Tensor]

Returns:

Dict of tensors matching xanesnet.models.schnet.schnet.SchNet.forward().

prediction_preparation(batch, predictions)[source]¶

Select absorber-site predictions from the per-atom output.

Parameters:

  • batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry graph batch carrying absorber_mask.

  • predictions (Tensor) – Per-atom output tensor. (num_atoms_total, num_targets)

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predictions for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, reduce_channels_2)

target_preparation(batch)[source]¶

Prepare target spectra from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Target spectra for absorber atoms only. (n_abs, n_energies)

file_name_extraction(batch)[source]¶

Extract file names from the batch.

Parameters:

batch (GeometryGraphBatch) – Collated geometry-graph batch.

Return type:

ndarray

Returns:

Array of file name strings aligned with absorber targets. (n_abs,)

xanesnet.batchprocessors.registry module¶

Registry for XANESNET batch processor classes.

class xanesnet.batchprocessors.registry.BatchProcessorRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Registry for batch processor classes keyed by dataset and model type.

classmethod register(dataset_type, model_type)[source]¶

Register a batch processor class for a dataset/model pair.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Dataset registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

  • model_type (str) – Model registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[BatchProcessor]], type[BatchProcessor]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If the dataset/model pair is already registered.

classmethod get(dataset_type, model_type)[source]¶

Return the batch processor class registered for a dataset/model pair.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Dataset registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

  • model_type (str) – Model registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[BatchProcessor]

Returns:

Registered batch processor class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no processor is registered for the pair.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered dataset/model key pairs.

Return type:

list[tuple[str, str]]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.
